findings.summary: The tests bypass the composition root by manually wiring the adapters to the use-case instead of calling buildApplication(ctx), failing to prove that the system correctly selects the active store based on configuration.
findings.suggested_fix: Use the actual composition root to resolve the use-case: `const app = buildApplication(ctx); const report = await app.getWeeklyReport(...)` instead of manually instantiating `createGetWeeklyReportUseCase` with `createPostgresCandleReadAdapter`.
